description: Brandon types 'participant app' into the search bar on the Studies page to filter the list of studies.
frame_description: The user is on the Studies dashboard and is using the search bar to find a specific study.

description: The study list dynamically filters as the user types, eventually showing only the 'BCA - Participant App Screen Reader Test' study.
frame_description: The list of studies below the search bar is updating in real-time based on the search query.

description: Brandon clears the search bar by deleting the typed text.
frame_description: The user is backspacing to clear the search criteria.

description: The study list updates to show all available studies as the search query is cleared.
frame_description: The full list of studies reappears as the search input becomes empty.

description: Brandon clicks on the team selector dropdown in the top navigation bar.
frame_description: The user activates the team selection menu in the top left corner of the interface.

description: The team selection dropdown menu opens, showing options like Settings, Switch team, and Log out.
frame_description: A vertical menu has appeared below the team name in the header.

description: Brandon hovers over the 'Switch team' option in the dropdown menu.
frame_description: The cursor is positioned over the 'Switch team' option, which is highlighted.

description: The 'Switch team' sub-menu appears to the right, listing a large number of available teams.
frame_description: A secondary menu has opened to the right of the main dropdown menu.

description: Brandon scrolls through the long list of teams in the 'Switch team' sub-menu.
frame_description: The user is navigating through the list of teams within the UI overlay.

description: Brandon clicks on the page background to close the team selection menu.
frame_description: The user clicks away from the menu to dismiss it.

description: The team selection menu and sub-menu close, returning focus to the Studies page.
frame_description: The dropdown menus disappear from the screen.

description: Brandon clicks on the 'Copy of AI Mod V2 Test' study from the list.
interaction_target: Copy of AI Mod V2 Test study link
frame_description: The user selects a specific study to view its results.

description: The browser navigates to the results page for the selected study.
frame_description: The page content changes as the results for the selected study load.

description: Brandon types 'participant app' into the search bar on the study results page to find a specific task.
page_title: Askable | Copy of AI Mod V2 Test
frame_description: The user is searching for a specific task within the study results.

description: The list of tasks and questions filters as the user types.
frame_description: The task list is updating to show matches for 'participant app'.

description: Brandon clicks on the 'Participant App: Wallet Core Flows & Expectations' result.
interaction_target: Participant App: Wallet Core Flows & Expectations list item
frame_description: The user selects a specific task result to view detailed analytics.

description: The page loads the detailed results for the selected task, including charts and individual responses.
frame_description: The interface transitions to a detailed view of the task results after a loading period.

description: Brandon clicks on the second task, 'Locate your Askable wallet', in the left sidebar navigation.
interaction_target: Locate your Askable wallet sidebar item
page_title: Askable | Participant App: Wallet Core Flows & Expectations
frame_description: The user switches to the results of the second task in the study.

description: The main content area updates to show the path analysis and screen analysis for the 'Locate your Askable wallet' task.
frame_description: The data visualizations and response list update to reflect the newly selected task.

description: Brandon clicks on the third task, 'Make a withdrawal from your Wallet', in the left sidebar navigation.
interaction_target: Make a withdrawal from your Wallet sidebar item
frame_description: The user switches to the results of the third task.

description: The main content area updates to show the results for the 'Make a withdrawal from your Wallet' task.
frame_description: The analytics dashboard refreshes with data for the third task.

description: Brandon clicks on the fourth task, 'Where would you expect to find this information?', in the left sidebar navigation.
interaction_target: Where would you expect to find this information? sidebar item
frame_description: The user switches to the results of the fourth task, which is a card sort.

description: The main content area updates to show the card sort results, including a table of cards and categories.
frame_description: The interface displays card sorting data for the fourth task.
